name: N.b.potato Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the potatoes in boiling salted water until soft.
2. Drain and push through a strainer or blend until fine.
3. Scald the milk with the onion, then remove the onion and add the milk to the potatoes slowly.
4. In a large pot, melt the butter and add the next five ingredients (salt, celery salt, pepper, flour).
5. Stir in the potato mixture and simmer for a few minutes.
6. Add parsley.
7. Makes 4 or 5 cups.
